calendar.matters:
Petition For Final Discharge And Declaration Of Robert Baird Jones In Support
Off Calendar Jun-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Meredith for Petitioner.

Mr. Meredith stated that the parties had not sent the receipts back and that the estate had been distributed. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Anderson.
